useful.title: Event-Driven Systems Playbook
useful.description: Tactical guide for designing resilient event-based architectures.
useful.reason: Useful because it includes patterns, anti-patterns, and migration strategy.

useful.title: Platform Engineering Metrics That Matter
useful.description: A practical metric model for measuring platform adoption and impact.
useful.reason: Useful for making platform investments visible to business stakeholders.

useful.title: Prompt Safety Patterns for Internal Tools
useful.description: Design safeguards for prompt injection and sensitive data leakage.
useful.reason: Useful because security concerns are addressed with concrete controls.

maybeUseful.title: UI Patterns for LLM-Powered Products
maybeUseful.description: Collection of interface patterns from early-stage AI products.
maybeUseful.reason: Maybe useful for ideation, but lacks accessibility depth.

maybeUseful.title: Quarterly Tech Predictions
maybeUseful.description: Opinion-heavy predictions on enterprise transformation trends.
maybeUseful.reason: Maybe useful as directional signal, not as execution guidance.

discarded.title: Clickbait Case Study With No Sources
discarded.description: Article with dramatic claims and no verifiable references.
discarded.reason: Not useful because credibility and depth are insufficient.
